body: This makes it easy to instantiate test-specific environment, without having to use `TestEnv`.
title: Create test-specific project

body: Registers `RungeKutta3` inside of `OceananigansReactantExt` using the same format / setup as `QuasiAdamsBashforth2`. Enables Reactant compilation of models that default to / specify `RK3`, like `NonhydrostaticModel`
title: Add support for RK3 in Reactant extension

body:
`import` considered harmful, [exhibit No 1138](https://buildkite.com/clima/oceananigans/builds/29252#019c3571-0fcc-436e-8757-6decd9a0d5cc/L596):
```
WARNING: import of SplitExplicitFreeSurfaces.maybe_extend_halos into MultiRegion conflicts with an existing identifier; ignored.
```
title: Explicit imports in MultiRegion, and remove all `import`s in that module
